title: cerastium carinthiacum subsp. austroalpinum
intro: Cerastium carinthiacum subsp. austroalpinum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family, known for its small white flowers and delicate appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cerastium carinthiacum subsp. austroalpinum include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
